_meta.keyKnowledge: We design and structure media arts works to communicate ideas, perspectives and meaning to an intended audience.

_source.w: We design and structure media arts works to communicate ideas, perspectives and meaning to an intended audience.
y: Understanding how to design media for a specific audience is essential in our media-saturated world.
Structuring media works effectively means our message reaches and resonates with viewers.
Design thinking in media arts combines creativity with strategic communication.
eg: We plan a media arts work with a clear concept, target audience and communication purpose.
We use storyboards, scripts and production plans to structure our media work before creation.
We design a short film that uses narrative structure to engage a specific audience.
We create a media campaign that uses multiple platforms to communicate a message.
We consider how genre conventions and audience expectations shape our design decisions.
We evaluate our design choices against the needs and preferences of our intended audience.
